reasoning: This workout directly improves lactate clearance and addresses your underdeveloped aerobic base, which is evident from the 9.3% decline in your 5 to 20-min power. Considering your last ride intensity and extended rest, these over-unders mimic the demands of the Alpine Loop's key climbs, crucial for maintaining power on long ascents.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 12-min over-unders: 2 min @ 201W, 3 min @ 242W, 2 min @ 205W, 3 min @ 249W, 2 min @ 209W. 3-min recovery between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
